opening_sequence: Turn 0: Upgrade capital via hunting (if 2+ animals visible)
Turn 1: Train warrior OR explorer depending on neighbor proximity
Turn 2-3: Research forestry -> lumber huts for economy

key_decisions.knights_vs_catapults: Knights if enemy has many small units; catapults if enemy has fortified cities
key_decisions.expand_vs_military: Expand if no enemy contact by turn 5; military if border contact

opening_sequence: Turn 0: Upgrade capital via fishing (if 2+ fish visible)
Turn 1: Train warrior, move towards coast
Turn 0: Upgrade capital via organization (if 2+ fruit visible)
Turn 2-3: Strategy for early defense OR Farming for economy
Turn 0: Move rider to capture nearby village
Turn 2: Capture second village, research organization or climbing
Turn 0: Move warrior, enjoy T1 capital city
Turn 1: Train warrior, research based on resources
Turn 1: Move swordsman towards closest neighbor
Turn 2: Train another swordsman, research hunting if possible
